app_release_notes: v1.2.12 - Fixed: your measured targets no longer disappear from a load after you import your chronograph -- they stay with the load and score together. New: right-click a saved target in the Targets library to add it to the load you're working on. And the left menu now lists Measure Target above Import Data, matching the step-by-step flow.
